title: dracocephalum moldavica var. bipinnatum
intro: Dracocephalum moldavica var. bipinnatum, also known as Balkan Dragon's Head, is a subspecies of Dracocephalum moldavica, a perennial herb native to Eastern Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dracocephalum moldavica var. bipinnatum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
